community_exclusive.title: Denver's new archbishop receives his mission and sends faithful on their mission: Know Jesus
community_exclusive.text_preview: On March 25 the Archdiocese of Denver welcomed its ninth bishop and sixth archbishop, Archbishop James R. Golka, amid the devoted prayers and ecstatic applause of thousands gathered at the CoBank Arena at the National Western Complex in Denver.
